instructions: Prioritize semantic correctness over stylistic feedback. Focus on proof statement soundness, verifier robustness, and transformer/native equivalence claims.

rules.rule: If claim wording or semantic scope changes, require corresponding code-level validation and tests. Reject over-claims where text promises stronger guarantees than implementation.
Verifier and proof parsing code must fail closed (return errors/false) on malformed or truncated input instead of panicking.
When equivalence metadata is emitted, require checked-steps, fingerprints, and final-state relationships to be internally consistent and test-covered.
For research-v2 artifacts, require schema validation and commitment/hash validation tests. Spec changes must not drift silently from artifact generation code.
